case_title: BANK OF THE WEST VS. S & L AFFILIATES INC DBA AMERICAN CLEANERS et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST AS TO DEFENDANT S & L AFFILIATES INC DBA AMERICAN CLEANERS ATUNZU, LINUS DOES ONE THROUGH TEN INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-29-2007 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-26-2007 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAR-14-2007
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST SERVED DEC-01-2006, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ATUNZU, LINUS

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $390.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT S & L AFFILIATES INC DBA AMERICAN CLEANERS ATUNZU, LINUS
DECLARATION ERNEST L. KNOWLES FILED RE: DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST
DECLARATION MARK SCHICKENDANTZ FILED RE: DEFAULT JUDGMENT (EQUIPEMENT VALUATION) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST SERVED DEC-01-2006, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT S & L AFFILIATES INC DBA AMERICAN CLEANERS
DECLARATION DOUGLAS HOLLOWAY FILED RE: DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST
DECLARATION ANSON LOUIE FILED RE: COPIES MADE AS BUSINESS RECORD (EVID CODE 1521, 1550) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES ONE THROUGH TEN INCLUSIVE
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAR-29-2007, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OR JUDGMENT ON FILE AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS

CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT S & L AFFILIATES INC DBA AMERICAN CLEANERS ATUNZU, LINUS POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: UNIPRESS MODEL DFEVB DOULBLE BUCK WHICH HAS A FAIR MARKET VALUE OF $9,500.00 AND IS, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $21,250.27 DAMAGES, $2,650.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $390.00 COSTS, $226.98 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $24,517.25, ENTITLED TO ITS IMMEDIATE POSSESSION, AND THAT PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER SAID PROPERTY FROM DEFENDANTS. SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH.
